description: Detailed restaurant experience documentation with location tagging, dish recommendations, pricing, and visual evidence showcasing food quality and dining atmosphere.
structural_recipe: 1) Name restaurant in Arabic and English with emoji separator. 2) Include precise location (neighborhood/street). 3) Tag photographer/content source. 4) List specific dishes ordered with personal rating emojis. 5) Provide pricing breakdown per person or buffet rates. 6) Add quality assessment of food and service. 7) Highlight unique offerings (delivery, cooking classes, new openings). 8) Use professional food photography showing plating and presentation.
why_it_works: Saudi audience values detailed social proof, transparent pricing, and curated recommendations from trusted reviewers. Location tagging enables discovery by neighborhood, pricing transparency builds trust, and specific dish recommendations reduce decision friction for restaurant selection decisions.
transplantation_caveats: Ramadan-specific promotions and iftar/suhoor pricing require seasonal adaptation
Must include Arabic naming conventions and dual-language presentation expected in Saudi market
Pricing transparency crucial—hiding costs damages credibility with Saudi audience
Attribution to photographer/reviewer (@mentions) signals authenticity and trustworthiness
cultural_constraints: Ramadan dining contexts require special messaging and timing sensitivity
International restaurant positioning emphasized alongside local/Arabic branding
Premium pricing acceptable if justified by quality presentation and detailed review
